speaker: speaker1
text: I need something to wash this down . Is there any juice in the fridge ?

speaker: speaker2
text: What is that ? It looks like something from a swamp !

speaker: speaker1
text: It's a green drink . It's supposed to be full of vitamins and minerals .

speaker: speaker2
text: You know , healthy eating doesn't have to make you gag .

speaker: speaker1
text: The sales lady said that even if I eat right , I wouldn't get enough vitamins .

speaker: speaker2
text: Have you ever tried it ? Or are you just going to believe the sales lady ?

speaker: speaker1
text: It's easier to drink this once a day than eat fruit and vegetables all day .

speaker: speaker2
text: It may take less time , but I don't know about easier . Yuck .
